title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
summary: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
summary: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

title: Codelco Eyes $2 Billion Gain From Unifying Copper Mines in Chile
summary: Codelco is seeking a combined $2 billion in cost savings and additional revenue by integrating the operations of three copper mines as the state-owned Chilean company tries to offset the impact of stagnating output and rising debt.

title: SpaceX Files for IPO on Nasdaq Under SPCX Symbol
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has filed papers to go public on the Nasdaq under the symbol SPCX. SpaceX is targeting as much as $75 billion in its listing at a valuation of more than $2 trillion, people familiar with the matter have said. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Backing or Trump Pump? Fairshake PAC Claims Primary Victories
summary: Fairshake said six primary victories on Tuesday revealed a “powerful bipartisan mandate” for pro-crypto policies. But other factors appear to have been at play.

title: Artificial Womb for Growing Mammals Is at 'One-Yard Line', Says Colossal CEO
summary: De-extinction startup Colossal claims it has built an artificial womb capable of supporting mammal development—and it's nearly complete.

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds $1.45 billion worth of bitcoin as firm looks to go public
summary: A stockpile of over 18,000 would make Elon Musk's SpaceX the seventh-largest Bitcoin holder, ahead of Coinbase.

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin mirrors 2022 bear market pattern as sentiment turns ‘extremely bearish’
summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally hit resistance at the 200-day MA near $82,400, a pattern CryptoQuant said is similar to the March 2022 bear market.

title: Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history

title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September
summary: AI lab is preparing for $1tn listing with bankers Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley and lawyers at Cooley
